title: Generate TTS and speak in VC

log.context: Generate TTS and speak in VC

It worked. The TTS audio played successfully in the voice channel.

**What happened:**
- `kokoro-speak.py` generated the audio but saved it to `/tmp/tmp02zrr6yz.mp3` instead of the requested `/tmp/vc-reply.wav` path — the script appears to ignore the output path argument and writes to a temp file instead.
- Used the actual output path for the `speak` tool, which played 99KB of audio in the guild voice channel.
- The transcript was logged with the spoken text.
